howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No commission. Full control.
howItWorks.step1Body: Enter your address and get a free owner dashboard with local market data, comparable sales, and a timeline for your sale.
howItWorks.step2Body: One click sends your Owner Brief to competing agents in your area. They respond with real proposals — commission, marketing plan, portal coverage.
howItWorks.step3Body: Pick the best agent. Once instructed, they connect to your dashboard so you see every viewing, offer, and update in real time.

paths.ownerBody: Get a free dashboard with market data and comparable sales. When you're ready, send your brief to agents and choose the best deal.
paths.hunterBody: Tell us what you're looking for. We'll match you with properties and keep you updated as new homes hit the market.
paths.agentBody: Receive Owner Briefs from motivated sellers in your area. Respond with your proposal and win the instruction — on merit, not marketing spend.

whyYalla.title: Why Yalla?
whyYalla.item1Title: You get a dashboard. Not a bill.
whyYalla.item1Body: Every other platform charges you to list. We give you a free dashboard first — market data, comparable sales, a timeline for your sale. The dashboard is yours whether you use an agent or not.
whyYalla.item2Body: Instead of calling one agent and hoping for the best, you send your brief to multiple agents simultaneously. They respond with real proposals. You compare. You choose.
whyYalla.item3Body: Track every viewing, every offer, every piece of feedback in one place. If you instruct an agent, they connect to your dashboard so you see what's happening in real time.
whyYalla.item4Title: We're not agents. We're your tools.
whyYalla.item4Body: Yalla is a technology platform, not an estate agency. We don't take commission. We don't list your property. We give you the information and connections to make the best decision.

ctaBand.headline: Ready to take control of your sale?
ctaBand.body: Create your free dashboard in two minutes. No card required. No commission — ever.

auth.magicLinkSent: We sent you a link. No password needed.

owner.title: My Properties
owner.paymentSuccess: Payment successful! Your listing is now being published.

services.heroTitle: Everything you need to sell smarter
services.heroSubtitle: A free dashboard to understand your property. Optional tools to market it. Competing agents to sell it. No commission — ever.
services.dashboardSubtitle: Sign up in 2 minutes. Get instant market intelligence. No card required.
services.dashboardFeature1: Comparable sales data and automated valuation for your postcode
services.dashboardFeature2: Track viewings, offers, and buyer feedback in one place
services.dashboardFeature3: Send your Owner Brief to competing agents with one click
services.dashboardFeature4: Your data stays yours — export or delete anytime
services.briefSubtitle: You describe what you need. Agents compete to win your instruction. You choose the best proposal.
services.briefStep1Body: Tell us about your property, your timeline, and what matters most — fee, marketing, local knowledge, or speed.
services.briefStep2Body: Verified local agents receive your brief and submit competing proposals with their fee, strategy, and track record.
services.briefStep3Body: Review proposals side by side in your dashboard. Pick the agent that fits — or keep going on your own.
services.addonsTitle: Professional tools, when you need them
services.addonsSubtitle: Use these whether you instruct an agent or sell privately. Pay only for what you need.
services.addon1Desc: Local photographers, edited HD images within 24 hours. Buyers engage 3× more with professional shots.
services.addon2Desc: Interactive 3D walkthrough. Buyers explore your home before booking a viewing.
services.addon3Desc: Publication-ready floor plans and Energy Performance Certificate — required for Rightmove listings.
services.addon4Desc: Featured placement on Rightmove and Zoopla. Up to 4× more views than standard listings.
services.addonsNote: Prices shown are starting prices and may vary by location. All prices are confirmed before payment.
services.compTrad2: Locked into one agent's marketing plan
services.compTrad3: Limited visibility into viewings and feedback
services.compTrad4: Agent controls the process and the data
services.compYalla1: Free dashboard — no commission, no listing fee
services.compYalla2: Multiple agents compete with real proposals
services.compYalla3: Every viewing, offer, and message tracked in your dashboard
services.compYalla4: You own the process and your data — always
services.ctaSubtitle: Create your free dashboard in 2 minutes. See your market data. Send your brief when you're ready.
